productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note With plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike Dual Fusion TR II running shoe is perfect for runners who have a neutral to slightly overpronated gait. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as great everyday choice for those who walk a lot. Product Details Soft, single-layer mesh for breathable comfort with a perforated, internal fit saddle work with lacing system for comfortable and snug fit Strategically placed overlays offer lightweight support to the midfoot region Internal heel counter works with external heel overlays to supply snug stability Gilly lacing system promotes a supportive, locked-in fit EVA sock-liner offers plush comfort and performance Dual-density Phylon midsole (has a softer foam in the centre with firmer foam on the perimeter for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced support) Moulded siping on the firmer density foam is designed to act as a crash pad for smoother transition from heel-strike Solid rubber waffle outsole delivers cushioning and optimal traction on varied surfaces Forefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motion Material and Care Mesh Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
